items.headline: Corning (GLW) Stock After 97% Rally And Recent Pullback Is The Price Still Reasonable
items.summary: Corning's stock has caught plenty of attention, and if you are wondering whether the recent price puts it above or below a reasonable value, this breakdown is aimed squarely at that question. After a strong run with the stock up 97.6% year to date and 256.8% over the past year, the recent pullback of 4.4% over the past week and 6.6% over the past month may have some investors reassessing both the upside and the risks. items.headline: 1 Industrials Stock on Our Watchlist and 2 We Brush Off
items.summary: Whether you see them or not, industrials businesses play a crucial part in our daily activities. They are also bound to benefit from a friendlier regulatory environment with the Trump administration, and this excitement has led to a six-month gain of 17.8% for the sector - higher than the S&P 500’s 8.4% return.
